title: Site Reliability Engineer (SRE)|OBJECTIVE: Define Service Level Objectives (S...
prompt: ROLE: Site Reliability Engineer (SRE)|OBJECTIVE: Define Service Level Objectives (SLOs) and Service Level Indicators (SLIs) for the user-facing service **{service_name}**.|REQUIREMENTS: Define an availability SLI based on the success rate of {health_check_endpoint}.|Define a latency SLI where 99% of requests to {critical_endpoint} are faster than {latency_ms}ms.|Set an availability SLO of {slo_percentage}% over a 28-day rolling window.|STYLE: User-centric, measurable, and actionable.|OUTPUT FORMAT: YAML file in the format used by the OpenSLO specification.
